fields.Name: IT01 - Server Cache Miss/Hit Symmetry
fields.Description: Reproduces server-cache-tests.ts S1 (cache MISS, narrow Fields, cache write) and S2 (subsequent HIT, identical shape, ExecutionTime 0, no rewrite) against a live SQLServerDataProvider via the IntegrationTestDriver.

ExpectedOutcomes.summary: S1 writes RunViewCache and returns the requested fields + PK; S2 hits the same fingerprint with identical shape, ExecutionTime 0, and no rewrite.
